texts: i got caught robbing a bank
i got my app to work
i was thinking randomly about how sandy was probly rly smart, and then mommy told me that
i got two samples from pinkberry
the girl at sweet lady jane gave me a weird looking piece and i said it was body positivity cause she gave me extra
i chose to eat my extra large extra weird slice of pie next to these friends that were arguing? or so i thought. but actually, one was comforting the other
this really pretty girl was waiting on the couch looking sour. then a snarky looking boy pulled up in a nice new black truck. of course it was her ride
this really pretty girl was waiting on the couch looking sour. then a snarky looking boy pulled up in a nice new black truck. of course it was her ride
I figured out how to do the thing with my mind
The cookie crumbs were for looking around in bed and then I found the poem to go with it
I met a girl in the crosswalk and we became friends
I kept seeing the same short girl in different places, trying on clothes
Sandy called in the one minute while I had my phone on airplane mode to download a photo of Instagram

I was thinking about those cakes. I wanted to make it that dinner party. The small ones with three layers that Evan made me not make, and then they were having a cake decorating party that sweet Lady, Jane, and decorating those exact kind of cakes.
for some reason, I came to the conclusion that Sandy Greenberg must've been really smart and then turned out that Mommy had been talking about that with Sandra and Cory at the party in New York
I saw an owl on the fence between my house and Peron's and I had been thinking about all the recent owl sightings earlier that day
it was hard to believe someone would leave a timer on for so long and then I realized I had set it
daddy told me his story about writing an essay about thinking someone's features in a short story was describing England
